'''nofagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yohimbinized|yohimbinized]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-f-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yohimbinized|yohimbinized]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nofagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofagithi|nofagithi]] || [[word:nofagiji|nofagiji]] || [[word:nofagishi|nofagishi]] || [[word:nofagiki|nofagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofaguthuthu|nofaguthuthu]] || [[word:nofagujuju|nofagujuju]] || [[word:nofagushushu|nofagushushu]] || [[word:nofagukuku|nofagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofaguthu|nofaguthu]] || [[word:nofaguju|nofaguju]] || [[word:nofagushu|nofagushu]] || [[word:nofaguku|nofaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofagufthuf|nofagufthuf]] || [[word:nofagufjuf|nofagufjuf]] || [[word:nofagufshuf|nofagufshuf]] || [[word:nofagufkuf|nofagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofagethe|nofagethe]] || [[word:nofageje|nofageje]] || [[word:nofageshe|nofageshe]] || [[word:nofageke|nofageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofagothotho|nofagothotho]] || [[word:nofagojojo|nofagojojo]] || [[word:nofagoshosho|nofagoshosho]] || [[word:nofagokoko|nofagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofagotho|nofagotho]] || [[word:nofagojo|nofagojo]] || [[word:nofagosho|nofagosho]] || [[word:nofagoko|nofagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofagofthof|nofagofthof]] || [[word:nofagofjof|nofagofjof]] || [[word:nofagofshof|nofagofshof]] || [[word:nofagofkof|nofagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfthÃŸf|nofagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfjÃŸf|nofagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfshÃŸf|nofagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfkÃŸf|nofagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|nofagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|nofagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|nofagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|nofagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfthÃŸf|nofagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfjÃŸf|nofagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfshÃŸf|nofagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfkÃŸf|nofagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfthÃŸf|nofagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfjÃŸf|nofagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfshÃŸf|nofagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nofagÃŸfkÃŸf|nofagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nofagÃḊthÃḊ|nofagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:nofagÃḊjÃḊ|nofagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:nofagÃḊshÃḊ|nofagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:nofagÃḊkÃḊ|nofagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nofagathatha|nofagathatha]] || [[word:nofagajaja|nofagajaja]] || [[word:nofagashasha|nofagashasha]] || [[word:nofagakaka|nofagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nofagatha|nofagatha]] || [[word:nofagaja|nofagaja]] || [[word:nofagasha|nofagasha]] || [[word:nofagaka|nofagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nofagafthaf|nofagafthaf]] || [[word:nofagafjaf|nofagafjaf]] || [[word:nofagafshaf|nofagafshaf]] || [[word:nofagafkaf|nofagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nofagasha|nofagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nofagshÃḋsha|nofagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nofagrosha|nofagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nofagmusha|nofagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nofagyasha|nofagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonofagnkshÃḋsha|gonofagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonofagnkrosha|gonofagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonofagnkmusha|gonofagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonofagnkyasha|gonofagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nofafagasha|nofafagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nofafagshÃḋsha|nofafagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nofafagrosha|nofafagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nofafagmusha|nofafagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nofafagyasha|nofafagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonofafagnkshÃḋsha|gonofafagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonofafagnkrosha|gonofafagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonofafagnkmusha|gonofafagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonofafagnkyasha|gonofafagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nefÃḊgasha|nefÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nefÃḊgshÃḋsha|nefÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nefÃḊgrosha|nefÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nefÃḊgmusha|nefÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nefÃḊgyasha|nefÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonefÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|gonefÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonefÃḊgnkrosha|gonefÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonefÃḊgnkmusha|gonefÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonefÃḊgnkyasha|gonefÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nofagasha|nofagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nofagshÃḋsha|nofagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nofagrosha|nofagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nofagmusha|nofagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nofagyasha|nofagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonofagnkshÃḋsha|gonofagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonofagnkrosha|gonofagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonofagnkmusha|gonofagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonofagnkyasha|gonofagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
